title: Dynamics and Astrophysics of Galaxies
category: galaxy dynamics; galaxy structure; formation; observational tools
why_relevant: Modern online graduate textbook; strongest all-round backbone for dynamics, disks, ellipticals, halos, formation and evolution.

title: Fundamentals of Galaxy Dynamics Formation and Evolution
why_relevant: Concise open-access book emphasizing stellar dynamics and growth of structure; useful for mathematical foundations.

title: Introduction to Galaxy Formation and Evolution: From Primordial Gas to Present-Day Galaxies
authors: Andrea Cimatti; Filippo Fraternali; Carlo Nipoti
why_relevant: arXiv-hosted introductory chapter; provides logical cosmology-to-galaxy-evolution overview and observational context.

title: Galaxy Morphology
why_relevant: Extensive morphology reference covering Hubble sequence, bars, rings, lenses, dwarfs, peculiars, mergers, and physical interpretation.

title: Galaxy Disks
why_relevant: Disk structure reference; directly relevant to surface-brightness profiles, scale lengths, disk truncations, and morphology.

title: A Review of Galactic Dynamics
why_relevant: Compact dynamics reference for disk galaxies, stability criteria, resonances, and dynamical-friction concepts.

title: Testing galaxy formation and dark matter with low surface brightness galaxies
category: LSB galaxies; dark matter; galaxy formation
why_relevant: Open-access review/perspective focused on why LSB galaxies are decisive tests of galaxy-formation and dark-matter models.

title: Galaxies through Space and Time
category: observational galaxies; nearby and distant galaxies
why_relevant: High-quality observational overview with Hubble results; useful for poster/talk framing and visual context.

title: Astronomy 2e
category: intro astronomy; Milky Way; galaxies; AGN; galaxy evolution
why_relevant: Open textbook; use chapters 25–28 for baseline explanations before deeper graduate texts.
